title: parosela jamesii
intro: Parosela jamesii, also known as the 'Palo Santo', is a type of tree native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a medicinal plant used to relieve stress, anxiety, and depression, and its extracts have been shown to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Parosela jamesii include its ability to improve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Parosela jamesii is often used as an essential oil, which can be inhaled or applied topically to its leaves, and can also be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
